Off Calendar Apr-14-2008 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Continued To Apr-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McDonald for Nancy Sarandria (Petitioner).

Mr. McDonald stated that the final inventory has been submitted to the referee and that the only assets were stocks, and the cause of action regarding elder abuse. The matter was continued to April 14, 2008.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-04-2008 Continued To Mar-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any party, counsel or interested person. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Executor and the Attorney for failure to file an inventory and appraisal and to show why the powers should not be suspended. The return date is March 3, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Hill.

After reviewing the register of actions, a partial inventory and appraisal has been filed. The Order to Show Cause will not be issued. The March 3, 2008 date will remain on calendar for status.
